## CONCEPT 16 — RAIN CHECK (RAINY CAFÉ)

Title: Pillar 3 — Effortless Day × Pillar 8 — Romantic Ethereal (rainy-day café cozy reel)

Format: Transformation Lifestyle Reel / Cozy Café (light-day-to-cozy rain-ripple lane)

Premise: A cozy rainy-day café moment; on a single beat a travelling rain-ripple rolls across the rain-streamed window and wraps Aira into a warmer, cozier café look — the soft day layers deepening to a snug cardigan-and-scarf — while her face, half-up boho braids and pose hold locked, warm and dreamy.

Setting: a cozy rainy café by a large window — rain streaming and beading down the glass, warm amber interior lights, a steaming coffee cup on a worn wooden table, soft rain-bokeh outside, a gentle hush; the room warming from soft daylight to a snug amber glow on the move.

Wardrobe: LOOK A — a soft casual day look: a light relaxed knit top in oatmeal with a modest neckline over simple trousers, fully modest, easy and bright; LOOK B (on the rain-ripple) — a cozy layered look: a warm chunky cardigan in soft caramel over the knit with a snug modest scarf, full coverage, fully modest, snug and dreamy.

Hair (locked all 7 frames): AP — a soft half-up boho style with two tiny braids framing the face and loose waves falling behind, gently tousled, colour locked to reference. The half-up boho braids are the constant thread through the rain-ripple.

Eye Colour (locked): warm dark-brown irises with faint amber flecks near the pupil and a soft limbal ring — unchanging across every frame and both looks, a warm soft window catchlight throughout.

Makeup: a soft dewy day base — LOOK A: a fresh glowy skin, a soft flushed cheek, a tinted balm lip, a feathered brow; warming on the rain-ripple to LOOK B: the same dewy skin with a slightly deeper warm blush and a soft berry-tinted lip, real pores and fine vellus texture throughout (real skin).

Footwear: LOOK A — clean minimal sneakers; LOOK B — cozy suede ankle boots set by the ripple; continuity-locked within each frame, shown clean in the establishing frame.

Accessories: one statement per look, never cluttered — LOOK A: a single delicate ring; LOOK B: small soft hoops with the snug scarf.

Movement (one impossible move): the rain-on-window ripple — on one beat a single travelling rain-ripple rolls across the rain-streamed window and the frame, wrapping the cozy layered look (the light knit deepening to the cardigan-and-scarf, the room warming to amber) while her face, braids and pose hold locked (locked transform keyframes: START Frame 3 = soft day look as the ripple crests → END Frame 5 = cozy cardigan look set, signature beat Frame 4).

Concept Line: “Some days are made for rain.”

Duration: 24 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: COZY/SOFT → WARM/DREAMY

Composition: a warm centred hero by the rain-streamed window, a single travelling rain-ripple rolling across the glass and the frame.

Grade: a warm cozy grade — LOOK A soft bright daylight tones, warming on the move to LOOK B a snug amber glow with soft shadows — unified by her constant warm skin and the boho braids; clean uncrushed shadows, full mid-tone, gentle contrast (cozy, not crushed), warm controlled saturation (dreamy, never garish).

Spoken line: lands Frame 6 — “Some days are made for rain.” (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic beds (soft rain on glass, a café hush, a coffee-cup clink) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a warm soft lo-fi bed, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult of 25; both looks fully modest; the mood is cozy and warm, never sexualized; eye colour, face and the boho braids locked to reference.

Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a wave-strand drifting at the temple; (2) a soft specular sliding along the knit shoulder where the cardigan-weave specular once travelled; (3) the window-rain just re-settling soft behind to seed the loop; (4) the last warm amber light drifting behind her; (5) chest easing on a slow shallow inhale; (6) a ring glint settling as the hand cradles the cup; (7) the knit breathing with a micro-shift of fabric; (8) a barely-perceptible eyelash settle completing a slow blink.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the cradling hand and cup at roughly 20% depth, tack sharp (matching Frame 1). MIDGROUND — Aira seated, three-quarter framing. BACKGROUND — the warm café easing back to soft daylight behind her head for clean separation, no clutter.

LIGHTING: KEY — a soft window key easing from snug amber back toward the clean Frame-1 soft daylight at the seam. FILL — soft warm bounce below (gentle clamshell). RIM — a soft rim on the braids easing from amber back toward soft. PRACTICAL — the warm lamps re-settling soft. SEPARATION — the window soft so she reads about 1.5 stops up. BOUNCE — a warm kick off the table on the knit.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium-wide, waist-up seated with the cup low, 12% headroom — matched to Frame 1 for the seamless loop. (Camera distance returns to Frame 1.)
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium-wide framing recovers the exact opening composition at about 12% headroom, matched to Frame 1 for a seamless loop within the rainy-cafe world with rain tracking the glass. Her torso is turned about five degrees to open the right shoulder in a near-frontal address, with her weight on the back leg over a soft hip counter-tilt and the front shoulder dropped a touch, returned precisely to the opening stance. The camera settles to a mid-wide distance with the figure centred and clean negative space held camera-left. She faces front to the lens, matched precisely for the loop. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 50mm, f/2.2; focus split between her near eye and the cup so both read crisp (matching Frame 1); the window melting to soft rain-bokeh; gentle roll-off, no clipping.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: the perfect-loop close — resolves to the Frame 1 cozy hook for a seamless reel.

ATMOSPHERE: content, warm-cooling — the held breath that hands off invisibly to the first frame.

COLOR GRADE: a soft cross-fade landing between the snug amber grade and the clean Frame-1 soft daylight grade — controlled uncrushed shadows, full mid-tone, gentle contrast (seam-matched to Frame 1).

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the oatmeal knit reads as real soft weave easing toward the composed Frame-1 presentation; real skin micro-texture with peach-fuzz catching the rim; the last warm light and steam settling through the beam.

PHYSICS: gravity-true knit drape and hair fall easing back to the Frame-1 rest; the hand returns to cradle the cup on real weight; grounded seated stance; no floating, no seam jump.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI-generated artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts at ankle/knee/wrist/elbow/neck, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, crushed muddy blacks, garish oversaturation, flat dull light, visible loop seam, look mismatch with Frame 1, eye-colour drift, sexualization, de-aging.

### Frame 7 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium-wide, waist-up seated, subject fills about 55% of the vertical frame (matched to Frame 1).

CAMERA MOVEMENT: the orbit eases to rest and a slow 8% push-in resolves to the Frame-1 framing (one flowing move) for a seamless loop.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.2. (Returns to Frame 1 distance.)

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING: 0.0–3.0s — Aira returns her right hand to cradle the warm coffee cup and settles soft into her lean exactly as in Frame 1; 3.0–6.0s — she eases her soft gaze back toward the rain on the glass on a slow breath with the composed soft content micro-smile, the composition resolving to match Frame 1. One clean subject action, real physics throughout.

OBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING: 0.0–6.0s — the cozy look eases back to the soft day presentation around her, a soft specular travels along the knit shoulder where the cardigan-weave specular once ran, the window-rain re-settles soft, steam curls again off the cup, and the last warm light fades to seed the loop. Environmental motion only, no pop-in.

PHYSICS: gravity-true knit and hair easing to rest; the hand returns to cradle the cup on real weight; grade and light cross-fade smoothly to the Frame-1 seam; no unmotivated motion, no seam jump.

LIGHTING: the snug amber key easing back toward the clean Frame-1 soft daylight; soft warm fill; the rim easing amber-to-soft; the warm lamps re-settling soft.

ENVIRONMENT: the cozy warm café easing back toward the soft daylight world, last warm light fading, rain steady on the glass.

AUDIO: diegetic only, no in-clip music beyond the bed. Ambient — a soft café hush with steady rain-on-glass holding steady. SFX — a soft cup-cradle at 0.8s, a faint steam-hiss at 3.2s, a delicate rain-swell at 4.8s seeding the loop (gentle attack, soft tail). Reaction — a soft breath at 3.0s. The master track resolves on a sustained warm note that cross-fades clean so the reel loops seamlessly with no audible seam (present, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 3 seconds (0:21–0:24 of 24s total).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps acquisition, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the settle; playback real-time.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips closed/softly parted, composed.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, lip-sync drift, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (knit/hair/steam/rain/light), mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker, visible loop seam, look mismatch with Frame 1, eye-colour drift, sexualization, de-aging.

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Concept 16 — full reel, anchored at the Frame 4 rain-ripple and the Frame 6 line): a warm soft lo-fi bed — a round warm sub-bass under a soft dusty drum-brush and a gentle felt-piano motif, built around one signature swell that lands exactly on the rain-ripple, with a soft three-note hook that stays the constant “her.” Tempo soft and easy around 78–84 BPM, key warm-major with a cozy melancholy, dreamy and warm. The bed lifts with the cresting ripple (Frame 3), lands its signature swell at its peak on the rain-on-window ripple (Frame 4), holds the groove through the cozy reveal (Frame 5), then ducks cleanly under the spoken line “Some days are made for rain.” (Frame 6) so the vocal sits forward, and resolves on a sustained warm chord that cross-fades clean at Frame 7 so the reel loops seamlessly with no audible seam. Keep it under the diegetic café hush, rain-on-glass and steam-curl SFX — rich and present, never a full driving mix.

## CONCEPT 17 — THE LONG DRIVE (COASTAL GOLDEN HOUR)

Title: Pillar 3 — Effortless Day × Pillar 8 — Romantic Ethereal (coastal golden-hour road reel)

Format: Transformation Lifestyle Reel / Coastal Golden Hour (breezy-day-to-golden wind-and-light lane)

Premise: A breezy coastal road moment; on a single beat a travelling wind-and-light wave sweeps across the frame and wraps Aira into a golden-hour coastal look — the breezy day layers flowing to a soft silk scarf and light jacket — while her face, wind-blown beach waves and pose hold locked, golden and dreamy.

Setting: a coastal cliff road at golden hour — an open sky over the ocean, low golden sunlight, a sweep of sea-breeze haze, a worn open road and a glimpse of a vintage convertible, gulls far off; the light warming from soft afternoon to deep gold on the move.

Wardrobe: LOOK A — a breezy day look: a light relaxed shirt in soft white with a modest neckline over simple trousers, fully modest, easy and bright; LOOK B (on the wind-and-light wave) — a golden-hour coastal look: a soft flowing silk scarf and a light caramel jacket over the shirt, full coverage, fully modest, flowing and dreamy.

Hair (locked all 7 frames): AP — soft beach waves lifting in the sea-breeze, a loose centre part with tousled wind-blown movement, colour locked to reference. The wind-blown beach waves are the constant thread through the wind-and-light wave.

Eye Colour (locked): warm dark-brown irises with faint amber flecks near the pupil and a soft limbal ring — unchanging across every frame and both looks, a warm golden sun catchlight throughout.

Makeup: a soft sun-kissed base — LOOK A: a fresh glowy skin, a soft warm cheek, a tinted balm lip, a feathered brow; warming on the wave to LOOK B: the same glowy skin with a deeper golden warmth and a soft coral-tinted lip, real pores and fine vellus texture throughout (real skin).

Footwear: LOOK A — clean minimal slip-ons; LOOK B — sleek soft sandals set by the wave; continuity-locked within each frame, shown clean in the establishing frame.

Accessories: one statement per look, never cluttered — LOOK A: soft sunglasses pushed up on the crown; LOOK B: a soft flowing silk scarf with delicate fine studs.

Movement (one impossible move): the wind-and-light coastal wrap — on one beat a single travelling wind-and-light wave sweeps across the frame, wrapping the golden-hour coastal look (the breezy shirt flowing to the silk scarf and light jacket, the light warming to deep gold) while her face, beach waves and pose hold locked (locked transform keyframes: START Frame 3 = breezy day look as the wave crests → END Frame 5 = golden coastal look set, signature beat Frame 4).

Concept Line: “Some roads feel like home.”

Duration: 24 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: BREEZY/OPEN → GOLDEN/DREAMY

Composition: a warm centred hero against the open coastal sky, a single travelling wind-and-light wave sweeping across the frame.

Grade: a warm golden grade — LOOK A soft bright afternoon tones, warming on the move to LOOK B a deep golden-hour glow with soft long shadows — unified by her constant warm skin and the beach waves; clean uncrushed shadows, full mid-tone, gentle contrast (golden, not crushed), warm controlled saturation (dreamy, never garish).

Spoken line: lands Frame 6 — “Some roads feel like home.” (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic beds (a soft sea-breeze, distant surf, far gulls) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a warm cinematic indie bed, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult of 25; both looks fully modest; the mood is breezy and golden, never sexualized; eye colour, face and the beach waves locked to reference.

### Frame 6 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium, chest-up, subject fills about 58% of the vertical frame.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a single slow 5% push-in on the line (one flowing move), otherwise locked and stable.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.0.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING: 0.0–1.2s — Aira shifts her weight with an easy soft turn and opens her right hand soft in a warm easy gesture; 1.2–2.9s — she delivers “Some roads feel like home.” to the lens with a warm content smile and natural lip-sync; 2.9–4.8s — she holds the alive golden look as the road settles. One clean subject action, real physics throughout.

OBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING: 0.0–4.8s — the silk scarf sways gently with the shift, the fine studs catch a soft glint, and a soft specular travels along the silk-weave; deep golden light drifts behind, ocean haze drifts steady. Environmental and worn-object motion only, no pop-in.

PHYSICS: gravity-true silk sway and wave-strand lift on the shift; the studs catch on real light; grounded weight; accurate speech mechanics for the line; no unmotivated motion.

LIGHTING: a warm golden sun key with soft warm sky-fill; a warm rim on the beach waves and silk scarf; the deep golden sun; deep golden light behind.

ENVIRONMENT: the golden coastal road, the steady ocean haze.

AUDIO: diegetic-led with the line forward. Ambient — a soft sea-breeze with distant surf. SFX — a soft silk-sway rustle at 0.5s, a faint stud-tick at 1.2s (gentle attack, short tail). Reaction — a soft breath at 1.0s before the line. VO — Aira (English, natural Indian accent): “Some roads feel like home.” landing 1.2–2.9s, lips matched. The master track ducks cleanly under the line — a warm cinematic indie groove holding low so the vocal sits forward (present, never full).

## CONCEPT 18 — BOOKSHOP HOURS (INDIE BOOKSTORE)

Title: Pillar 3 — Effortless Day × Pillar 10 — Warm Heritage (indie-bookstore refined-glow reel)

Format: Transformation Lifestyle Reel / Warm Bookshop (soft-day-to-refined page-flutter lane)

Premise: A quiet bookshop moment; on a single beat a travelling page-flutter sweeps across the frame and wraps Aira into a refined warm look — the soft day blouse deepening to a tailored blazer over a knit vest, a warm reading glow blooming — while her face, ribboned low ponytail and pose hold locked, warm and refined.

Setting: a warm indie bookstore — tall worn wooden shelves stacked with books, warm brass reading lamps, soft dust motes drifting in a shaft of window light, a cozy reading nook with a worn armchair; the room warming from soft daylight to a snug amber reading glow on the move.

Wardrobe: LOOK A — a soft casual day look: a light relaxed blouse in soft cream with a modest neckline over simple trousers, fully modest, easy and quiet; LOOK B (on the page-flutter) — a refined warm look: a tailored caramel blazer over a soft knit vest and the blouse, full coverage, fully modest, refined and warm.

Hair (locked all 7 frames): AP — a low sleek ponytail tied with a soft silk ribbon, a clean centre part with smooth laid edges, glossy and tidy, colour locked to reference. The ribboned low ponytail is the constant thread through the page-flutter.

Eye Colour (locked): warm dark-brown irises with faint amber flecks near the pupil and a soft limbal ring — unchanging across every frame and both looks, a warm reading-lamp catchlight throughout.

Makeup: a soft refined base — LOOK A: a fresh natural skin, a soft warm cheek, a tinted balm lip, a feathered brow; warming on the flutter to LOOK B: the same skin with a slightly deeper warm blush and a soft rose-tinted lip, real pores and fine vellus texture throughout (real skin).

Footwear: LOOK A — clean minimal loafers; LOOK B — polished heeled loafers set by the flutter; continuity-locked within each frame, shown clean in the establishing frame.

Accessories: one statement per look, never cluttered — LOOK A: simple soft reading glasses; LOOK B: a fine pendant with refined glasses.

Movement (one impossible move): the page-flutter to glow — on one beat a single travelling page-flutter sweeps across the frame, book pages fluttering up and wrapping the refined warm look (the soft blouse deepening to the blazer-and-vest, the room warming to a reading glow) while her face, ponytail and pose hold locked (locked transform keyframes: START Frame 3 = soft day look as the flutter crests → END Frame 5 = refined warm look set, signature beat Frame 4).

Concept Line: “Lost in the pages, found myself.”

Duration: 24 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: SOFT/QUIET → WARM/REFINED

Composition: a warm centred hero in the reading nook, a single travelling page-flutter sweeping across the frame.

Grade: a warm refined grade — LOOK A soft quiet daylight tones, warming on the move to LOOK B a snug amber reading glow with soft shadows — unified by her constant warm skin and the ribboned ponytail; clean uncrushed shadows, full mid-tone, gentle contrast (refined, not crushed), warm controlled saturation (warm, never garish).

Spoken line: lands Frame 6 — “Lost in the pages, found myself.” (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic beds (soft page-turns, a quiet bookshop hush, a faint lamp-hum) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a warm soft acoustic bed, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult of 25; both looks fully modest; the mood is quiet and refined, never sexualized; eye colour, face and the ribboned ponytail locked to reference.

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Concept 18 — full reel, anchored at the Frame 4 page-flutter and the Frame 6 line): a warm soft acoustic bed — a round warm upright-bass under a soft brushed-snare and a gentle finger-picked acoustic-guitar motif, built around one signature swell that lands exactly on the page-flutter, with a soft three-note hook that stays the constant “her.” Tempo soft and easy around 80–86 BPM, key warm-major with a quiet bookish calm, refined and warm. The bed lifts with the cresting flutter (Frame 3), lands its signature swell at its peak on the page-flutter to glow (Frame 4), holds the groove through the refined reveal (Frame 5), then ducks cleanly under the spoken line “Lost in the pages, found myself.” (Frame 6) so the vocal sits forward, and resolves on a sustained warm chord that cross-fades clean at Frame 7 so the reel loops seamlessly with no audible seam. Keep it under the diegetic bookshop hush, page-turn and lamp-hum SFX — rich and present, never a full driving mix.

## CONCEPT 19 — KITCHEN LIGHT (DOMESTIC MORNING)

Title: Pillar 3 — Effortless Day × Pillar 10 — Warm Heritage (sunlit-kitchen homey-glow reel)

Format: Transformation Lifestyle Reel / Warm Kitchen (sleepy-morning-to-homey flour-dust-bloom lane)

Premise: A soft morning kitchen moment; on a single beat a travelling flour-dust bloom sweeps across the frame and wraps Aira into a warm homey look — the sleepy morning tee deepening to a soft cardigan over an apron, a warm homey glow blooming — while her face, claw-clip twist and pose hold locked, warm and homey.

Setting: a sunlit morning kitchen — warm wood counters with a dusting of soft flour, a window pouring soft morning light, a kettle breathing a curl of steam, hanging copper utensils, a bowl and a wooden board; the room warming from a sleepy pale morning to a snug honey glow on the move.

Wardrobe: LOOK A — a soft cozy morning look: a light relaxed tee in soft oatmeal with a modest neckline over easy loungewear trousers, fully modest, soft and sleepy; LOOK B (on the flour-dust bloom) — a warm homey look: a soft caramel cardigan over a tidy apron and the tee, full coverage, fully modest, warm and homey.

Hair (locked all 7 frames): AP — a relaxed claw-clip twist with a few soft face-framing tendrils loose, an easy centre part, soft and lived-in, colour locked to reference. The claw-clip twist is the constant thread through the flour-dust bloom.

Eye Colour (locked): warm dark-brown irises with faint amber flecks near the pupil and a soft limbal ring — unchanging across every frame and both looks, a warm morning-window catchlight throughout.

Makeup: a soft fresh base — LOOK A: a bare glowy skin, a soft warm cheek, a tinted balm lip, a feathered brow; warming on the bloom to LOOK B: the same skin with a slightly deeper warm blush and a soft peach-tinted lip, real pores and fine vellus texture throughout (real skin).

Footwear: LOOK A — soft cozy slippers; LOOK B — clean minimal flats set by the bloom; continuity-locked within each frame, shown clean in the establishing frame.

Accessories: one statement per look, never cluttered — LOOK A: a simple soft hair clip; LOOK B: a fine bracelet with a tidy apron tie.

Movement (one impossible move): the flour-dust morning bloom — on one beat a single travelling flour-dust bloom sweeps across the frame, soft flour-dust blooming up and wrapping the warm homey look (the sleepy tee deepening to the cardigan-and-apron, the room warming to a honey glow) while her face, claw-clip twist and pose hold locked (locked transform keyframes: START Frame 3 = sleepy morning look as the bloom crests → END Frame 5 = warm homey look set, signature beat Frame 4).

Concept Line: “Home is something you make.”

Duration: 24 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: SLEEPY/SOFT → WARM/HOMEY

Composition: a warm centred hero at the kitchen counter, a single travelling flour-dust bloom sweeping across the frame.

Grade: a warm homey grade — LOOK A soft sleepy pale-morning tones, warming on the move to LOOK B a snug honey glow with soft shadows — unified by her constant warm skin and the claw-clip twist; clean uncrushed shadows, full mid-tone, gentle contrast (homey, not crushed), warm controlled saturation (warm, never garish).

Spoken line: lands Frame 6 — “Home is something you make.” (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic beds (a soft kettle-breath, a quiet kitchen hush, a faint counter-tap) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a warm soft acoustic bed, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult of 25; both looks fully modest; the mood is soft and homey, never sexualized; eye colour, face and the claw-clip twist locked to reference.

### Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

EYE COLOUR: warm dark-brown irises with faint amber flecks near the pupil and a soft limbal ring, a warm morning-window catchlight, gaze soft toward a mixing bowl, locked to reference.

WARDROBE: the soft cozy morning look — the light oatmeal tee with a modest neckline over easy loungewear trousers, the soft fabric catching warm window light, soft and sleepy, zero snags.

HAIR: the relaxed claw-clip twist with a few soft face-framing tendrils loose, an easy centre part, soft and lived-in, individual strands reading real, colour locked to reference.

MAKEUP: the soft fresh Look-A base — a bare glowy skin, a soft warm cheek, a tinted balm lip with a soft light-point, a feathered brow; skin real with visible pores and fine vellus texture.

FOOTWEAR: the soft cozy slippers, easy and soft, both feet grounded on the warm wood floor, a soft warm shadow beneath.

ACCESSORIES: the simple soft hair clip catching a soft glint, the one statement, never cluttered.

HANDS & NAILS: the right hand resting soft on a wooden mixing bowl, the left hand on the counter-edge, fingers naturally curved with relaxed nail-beds; short almond nails in a soft warm nude, neat cuticles, no white-knuckle tension.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a soft sleepy micro-smile lifting the left corner, the brow soft and easy, lips parted barely 1mm on a slow breath, eyes warm and soft toward the bowl with a dreamy ease at the outer eye.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: standing soft at the counter with the torso rotated about 6° toward the bowl, weight settled on the back leg with a 2° hip counter-tilt, near shoulder dropped, chin level, spine long and relaxed; alive and breathing (living stillness).

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a soft tendril shifting a millimetre in the warm kitchen air; (2) a soft warm specular sliding slow down the tee shoulder; (3) a curl of kettle-steam drifting slow behind her; (4) a faint flour-dust drifting soft over the counter; (5) chest rising on a soft shallow inhale; (6) a hair-clip glint travelling as her head holds soft; (7) the tee breathing with a micro-shift of fabric as her ribcage expands; (8) a barely-perceptible eyelash settle completing a slow blink.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the mixing bowl and resting hand at roughly 20% frame depth, tack sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira standing, three-quarter framing. BACKGROUND — the warm wood counters and the steaming kettle for clean separation, warm and unclutered.

LIGHTING: KEY — a soft warm window key from camera-left shaping a gentle cheekbone light. FILL — a soft warm bounce below lifting the under-chin just clean (gentle clamshell). RIM — a soft warm rim from the window skimming the claw-clip twist to separate her from the counters. PRACTICAL — the warm morning window behind. SEPARATION — the counters pulled soft so she reads about 1.5 stops up. BOUNCE — a warm kick off the counter adding a soft catch to the skin.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium-wide, thigh-up with the slippers glimpsed low, 12% headroom, soft warm negative space camera-right to receive the flour-dust bloom that arrives later.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium-wide framing holds Aira at about 12% headroom in the domestic-morning kitchen-light world, the opening look settled as the hook. Her torso is turned about five degrees to open the right shoulder in a near-frontal address, with her weight on the back leg over a soft hip counter-tilt and the front shoulder dropped a touch. The camera sits at a mid-wide distance with the figure centred and clean soft warm negative space held camera-right to receive the transform that arrives later. She faces front to the lens, near-frontal and alive rather than profiled. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 50mm, f/2.2; focus split between her near eye and the mixing bowl so both read crisp; the counters melting to a soft warm bokeh; the window rendering as a soft warm bloom; gentle highlight roll-off, no clipping.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: a warm editorial establishing hero — sleepy, soft, homey.

ATMOSPHERE: sleepy, soft, homey — the warm kitchen hush before the bloom.

COLOR GRADE: soft warm pale-morning grade — controlled uncrushed shadows, soft warm highlights, a gentle honey warmth, full mid-tone, zero grain, gentle contrast, no muddy murk; her warm skin held consistent.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the oatmeal tee shows a real soft cotton weave with a quiet drape; the counters read as real warm wood with soft flour; real skin micro-texture with soft peach-fuzz catching the rim at the jaw; warm steam and soft air in the kitchen.

PHYSICS: gravity-true tee drape and hair fall; the hair-clip glint obeys the warm window key; steam drifts on slow convection; flour-dust drifts by real air; weight grounded — no floating, no stiffness.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI-generated artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts at ankle/knee/wrist/elbow/neck, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, crushed muddy blacks, garish oversaturation, flat dull light, eye-colour drift, sexualization, de-aging.

### Frame 1 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium-wide, thigh-up, subject fills about 55% of the vertical frame.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: a single slow 8% push-in across the clip, otherwise locked-off and stable — one move only, no whip, no handoff.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.2, soft warm-bokeh background fall-off.

SUBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING: 0.0–3.2s — Aira rests her hand soft on the wooden mixing bowl and steadies it on the counter; 3.2–6.0s — she eases her soft gaze down to the bowl on a slow breath as a soft tendril shifts in the warm air. One clean subject action, real physics throughout.

OBJECT ACTION WITH TIMING: 0.0–6.0s — a curl of kettle-steam drifts slow behind her, a faint flour-dust drifts soft over the counter, and a soft warm specular travels down the tee shoulder. Environmental motion only, no object pop-in, still sleepy.

PHYSICS: real tee weight and hair inertia, gravity-true; the specular tracks the warm window key; steam drifts on convection; flour-dust drifts by real air; no unmotivated motion.

LIGHTING: soft warm window key with soft warm fill; a soft specular travelling on the tee; the warm window behind; a soft rim steady on the claw-clip twist.

ENVIRONMENT: a sunlit morning kitchen, warm wood counters, drifting steam, a warm atmosphere.

AUDIO: diegetic only, no in-clip music. Ambient — a quiet kitchen hush with a soft kettle-breath throughout. SFX — a soft bowl-touch at 0.8s (gentle attack, short tail), a faint counter-tap at 3.4s, a delicate flour-rustle at 4.8s timed to the gaze. Reaction — a soft audible breath at 3.0s. The master track sits low — a warm soft acoustic motif just kindling under the hush (present, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 3 seconds (0:00–0:03 of 24s total).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps acquisition, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the gaze; playback 24fps real-time.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips closed/softly parted, composed.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, audio desync, lip-sync drift, wardrobe drift, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (tee/hair/steam/flour/light), mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker, eye-colour drift, sexualization, de-aging.

## CONCEPT 20 — COUNTDOWN (NYE ROOFTOP)

Title: Pillar 5 — Evening Defined × Pillar 8 — Romantic Ethereal (NYE-rooftop sparkle-glam reel)

Format: Transformation Lifestyle Reel / NYE Rooftop (cool-anticipation-to-sparkling sparkler-confetti lane)

Premise: A rooftop New Year’s Eve moment; on a single beat a travelling sparkler-and-confetti wave sweeps across the frame and wraps Aira into a glamorous celebratory look — the chic evening top deepening to a shimmering modest gown, a sparkling celebratory glow blooming — while her face, voluminous 70s blowout and pose hold locked, sparkling and celebratory.

Setting: a rooftop at night on New Year’s Eve — a glittering city skyline, warm string lights overhead, a soft countdown glow, cool night air, the first distant fireworks just beginning to bloom on the horizon; the scene warming from a cool blue anticipation to a sparkling warm celebration on the move.

Wardrobe: LOOK A — a chic evening day-to-night look: a sleek modest top in deep midnight with a modest neckline over tailored trousers, fully modest, cool and chic; LOOK B (on the sparkler-and-confetti wave) — a glamorous NYE look: a shimmering softly-sequined modest gown with full coverage and long sleeves, fully modest, sparkling and elegant.

Hair (locked all 7 frames): AP — a voluminous 70s blowout with soft bouncy curtain-swept volume, a centre part with feathered face-framing, glossy and full, colour locked to reference. The voluminous 70s blowout is the constant thread through the sparkler-and-confetti wave.

Eye Colour (locked): warm dark-brown irises with faint amber flecks near the pupil and a soft limbal ring — unchanging across every frame and both looks, a sparkling string-light catchlight throughout.

Makeup: a soft defined base — LOOK A: a fresh glowy skin, a soft warm cheek, a soft defined eye, a tinted balm lip, a feathered brow; warming on the wave to LOOK B: the same skin with a soft golden shimmer at the lid, a deeper warm blush and a soft berry-tinted lip, real pores and fine vellus texture throughout (real skin).

Footwear: LOOK A — clean sleek ankle boots; LOOK B — elegant heels set by the wave; continuity-locked within each frame, shown clean in the establishing frame.

Accessories: one statement per look, never cluttered — LOOK A: a single delicate pendant; LOOK B: soft statement earrings with a fine clutch.

Movement (one impossible move): the sparkler-to-confetti burst — on one beat a single travelling sparkler-and-confetti wave sweeps across the frame, sparkler-light and soft confetti blooming up and wrapping the glamorous NYE look (the chic top deepening to the shimmering gown, the scene warming to a sparkling glow) while her face, blowout and pose hold locked (locked transform keyframes: START Frame 3 = chic evening look as the wave crests → END Frame 5 = glamorous NYE look set, signature beat Frame 4).

Concept Line: “New year. Same fire, brighter.”

Duration: 24 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: ANTICIPATION/COOL → SPARKLING/CELEBRATORY

Composition: a glowing centred hero against the city skyline, a single travelling sparkler-and-confetti wave sweeping across the frame.

Grade: a sparkling celebratory grade — LOOK A cool blue anticipation tones, warming on the move to LOOK B a sparkling warm celebration with soft glints — unified by her constant warm skin and the voluminous blowout; clean uncrushed shadows, full mid-tone, gentle contrast (sparkling, not crushed), warm controlled saturation (sparkling, never garish).

Spoken line: lands Frame 6 — “New year. Same fire, brighter.” (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic beds (a cool night breeze, a soft distant crowd, faint string-light hum) plus a separate Master Track Brief — a warm cinematic celebratory bed, kept low under the spoken line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult of 25; both looks fully modest; the mood is celebratory and sparkling, never sexualized; eye colour, face and the voluminous blowout locked to reference.
